title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes service that enables production-grade cluster deployment with a single click while automating operational overhead. It manages both the control plane and data plane, integrates with Karpenter for auto-scaling, and provides cost optimization and support for AI workloads including inference and training.
